textByHashes.120604521b1f4d312b56d32bd869376edcd97b96: I'm waiting to work on the excavations...
textByHashes.24d51f758b2cef24f07a401fff0491a6c821607a: ...though I don't really want to start digging again.
textByHashes.8d2adf67ce2ef391dd9e4707b5c9f5ee05be96a0: Not with monsters like that one in those caves.
textByHashes.512c3e7f2c476bf606e5ed26585b22d8e4955766: It had huge teeth and flaming red eyes, and was almost the size of the tunnel!
textByHashes.26424352c5861192da5ef3a4a659ca4411a7053d: Are you an adventurer, by any chance?
textByHashes.610670acadfc5c4f27140eb95ee6f22a960c6475: In that case, could you go and deal with that monster?
textByHashes.e6fa28d4040c6a456fccba680470b7e29ba92f8f: I don't want to have to face it again if it attacks the town.
textByHashes.36dbc574238fd3ec95cc7ba003738f2b962c504c: You'll need to get into the other caves first, of course.
textByHashes.41ae435eb639b27de0a44e62c219fcefb9bdf60e: There's a crack in the wall where the others are digging, but the rocks are loose, and can fall on you if you're not careful.
textByHashes.fb7849f32f7323697d6f34b6711259097852bd15: I can give you a mining prop to keep them from falling, if you give me a minute to find it...
textByHashes.429179e04f36c75e8f863d195dc49cedc47fdd5e: No, after that the only way you can get further is climbing up onto a high ledge, then crawling through a tunnel.
textByHashes.94e753b4366c5168deab4a9635598a6d79aeb8dd: ...and I think I might have broken the lift when I fell off it on my way back.
textByHashes.91edad0049a6d524772cf33fba2f3a274935f1ab: You'll probably need to fix the lift - I doubt you'd be able to climb.
textByHashes.f05177f3b20c49d57f440a5c60997e68d4f8bf56: Somewhere behind it. I couldn't get very far, what with the flooding in the tunnel.
textByHashes.ba6c10da4f29bbbbfa5a711ce3f5396b7ccfc148: There's some rope and some planks near the broken lift - those would probably come in handy.
textByHashes.fb8af987171d8210748baea41e299610be32ada0: Ah, here's that mining prop. I knew I had it somewhere.
textByHashes.dd7e479088c89a97affd71a612e6a2f85e24b863: Here you go. Good luck with fighting that monster.
textByHashes.cae989859329a02c099437142629048a42f5f5c8: That's what I thought, until I saw the sheer size of it. This thing probably MADE the tunnels!
textByHashes.1fdd2bed327e3d7f6d522f3e1623073a154a4323: I've heard stories from the Miscellanians. If you're the Regent, you must be quite a strong hero.
textByHashes.44dae93f829f90ae88a65b1eb785405077aa4e25: So what are you worried about? You probably eat monsters like that for breakfast!
textByHashes.04810d87225de617588a7562a1fd1f5ee78b0a9a: I'm not going near that crack in the wall again.
textByHashes.1f5da1430ef4abaf55df5c01f543c376f90baaf9: Rock falls and so on are fine, but sea monsters in caves - never!
textByHashes.399c8754df85855a71101a8f2719b0efebfe8675: Lucky I have a spare, isn't it?
